summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6 years of experience building and shipping production web applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js. Proven ability to deliver user-facing features at scale, maintaining RESTful APIs serving 500K+ daily requests, and improving CI/CD pipeline efficiency. BS in Computer Science with practical experience in PostgreSQL, AWS infrastructure, and automated testing practices.
